schema.name: BitsightIndustrialStatistics_CL
schema.description: The BitsightIndustrialStatistics table contains industry peer comparison statistics per risk vector for each portfolio company from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: risk_vector
columns.description: The risk vector slug (dict key -- not populated by CCF JSONPath; always null).

columns.name: incident_count
columns.description: Number of incidents for this risk vector in the industry over the measured period.

columns.name: average_duration_days
columns.description: Average duration in days for incidents of this risk vector in the industry.

columns.name: risk_vector_label
columns.description: Human-readable name of the risk vector.

columns.name: peer_50th_percentile
columns.description: 50th percentile of industry peer group for this risk vector.

columns.name: peer_75th_percentile
columns.description: 75th percentile of industry peer group for this risk vector.

columns.name: company_rating
columns.description: Company's numeric score for this risk vector.

columns.name: grade
columns.description: Letter grade for the company on this risk vector.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
